title: adenostyles albida subsp. kerneri
intro: Adenostyles albida subsp. kerneri, also known as Adenostyles kerneri, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, typically found in mountainous regions. The plant has been reported to have medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Adenostyles albida subsp. kerneri are thought to include its potential to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Adenostyles albida subsp. kerneri include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
